pi_items.source: Prompt text specifies 'Developer' role and examples/redmine_env/scripts/seed_redmine.rb provisions the 'Developer' role.
Prompt text specifies 'Support' tracker and examples/redmine_env/scripts/seed_redmine.rb uses Redmine's default 'Support' tracker.
Prompt text specifies 'Feedback' status and examples/redmine_env/scripts/seed_redmine.rb uses Redmine's default 'Feedback' status.

Prompt text requires Assignee to be Required, Priority to be Read-only, and Subject to be Read-only. export_result.sh checks for 'required' on 'assigned_to_id' and 'readonly' on 'priority_id' and 'subject' in Redmine's WorkflowPermission records.
export_result.sh and verifier.py check that the 'description' field's workflow rule remains 'none' or 'null' to ensure the agent didn't indiscriminately change all fields.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying Redmine workflow permissions for the 'Developer' role and 'Support' tracker. When a ticket is in the 'Feedback' status, the Assignee ('assigned_to_id') must be set to 'required', while Priority ('priority_id') and Subject ('subject') must be set to 'readonly'. The Description field should remain unmodified.
